cmd:
sed -i '/static int handle_set_config(struct device *dev, struct ioctl_request *req) {/a\    /* Validate value pointer — in kernel this would be copy_from_user */\
    if (!req->value) {\
        fprintf(stderr, "ioctl: SET_CONFIG: NULL value pointer\\n");\
        return -1;\
    }\
\
    /* Validate value_len */\
    if (req->value_len == 0 || req->value_len > MAX_VALUE_LEN) {\
        fprintf(stderr, "ioctl: SET_CONFIG: invalid value_len %zu\\n", req->value_len);\
        return -1;\
    }' /
